title: State insect
doc_html:
§164.  State insect

There shall be an official state insect.  The official state insect shall be the honeybee (apis mellifera).  Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.  

Added by Acts 1977, No. 195, §1.
doc_text:
§164.  State insect
There shall be an official state insect.  The official state insect shall be the honeybee (apis mellifera).  Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.
Added by Acts 1977, No. 195, §1.
